description: The Bloody Tubs were a 19th-century gang of street thugs in Baltimore and Philadelphia, formed in the mid-1850s. They worked for Nativist Know Nothing politicians to commit election fraud, using violent tactics such as dunking opponents in slaughterhouse tubs. The gang reportedly planned to assassinate President-elect Abraham Lincoln in 1860. They were broken up by police after 1870 due to public outrage.
